zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Ince於大約1304年出生在英國藍卡爾維根時，他的父親Richard Ince21歲，母親Elizabeth Radcliffe20歲。他於1326年與Margery de Trafford在英國英格蘭藍卡爾音-易-馬可費爾德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1334年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾特拉福德 曼諾享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Ince于大约1304年出生在英国藍卡爾維根时，他的父亲Richard Ince21岁，母亲Elizabeth Radcliffe20岁。他于1326年与Margery de Trafford在英国英格兰藍卡爾音-易-馬可費爾德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1334年在英国英格兰藍卡爾特拉福德 曼諾享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ince
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Ince in Makerfield (Lancashire), Ince (Cheshire), or Ince Blundell (Lancashire). The placenames derive from Proto-Welsh ïnïs ‘island’.

possibly a post-medieval West Midlands variant of Hints, a habitational name from either of two places called Hints (Staffordshire, Shropshire). The placenames probably derive from Proto-Welsh hïnt ‘way, path’ + Middle English plural -es.

possibly a variant with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s of Inn, from residence at an inn or inns, from Middle English in (singular) or innes (plural) ‘tavern, lodging(s), tenement(s)’. There seems also to have been some confusion with Scottish Innes .

variants.name: Ence
meanings: Americanized form of South German   Enz  , a short form of   Anselm  .
History: Two brothers, Johannes and Gottlieb Enz, immigrated from northern Switzerland to southern Utah around 1860. Their descendants bear the surname Ence.

variants.name: Innes
meanings: Scottish: shortened form of McInnis , from Gaelic Mag Aonghuis ‘son of Aonghus’.
Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Innes in Urquhart (Morayshire), named from Gaelic inis ‘island’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Ince was born about 1304, in Wigan, Lancashire, England, his father, Richard Ince, was 21 and his mother, Elizabeth Radcliffe, was 20. He married Margery de Trafford in 1326, in Ince-in-Makerfield, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1334, in Trafford Manor, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Ince est né environ 1304, à Wigan, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Ince, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Radcliffe, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Margery de Trafford en 1326, à Ince-in-Makerfield, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1334, à Trafford Manor, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans.

Er hat 1326 in Ince-in-Makerfield, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Margery de Trafford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Lui sposato Margery de Trafford nel 1326, nel Ince-in-Makerfield, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Robert Inceが約1304年にイギリスランカシュアイアウィガンで生まれた時，父Richard Inceは21歳，母Elizabeth Radcliffeは20歳であった。1326年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアインセ-イン-マケルフィールドでMargery de Traffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1334年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアトラフォード マノーで31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Ince(이)가 대략 1304년 영국 랭카실르 위건에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Ince(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Radcliffe(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1326년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 인스-이-마커필드에서 Margery de Trafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1334년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 트래퍼드 먼어에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Ince родился около 1304 г. в местности виган, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Ince было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Radcliffe, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery de Trafford в 1326 г. в местности инце-ин-меикирфиелд, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1334 г. в местности траффорд манор, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год.
